programs.title: Van Halen: A Mammoth Legacy
programs.desc: The career of Van Halen was as tumultuous as it was lucrative; they came to redefine the world of Rock and Roll; through all the trials and tribulations the band endured, their fame and influence in rock is cemented; this is the Mammoth Legacy of Van Halen.

programs.title: Bob Dylan: Leader of the Free World
programs.desc: Explore Bob Dylan's transformative journey through music, from folk poet to cultural icon and his impact on generations; learning the timeless legacy of his lyrics, voice and ever-evolving artistry.

programs.title: Jim Morrison's Final Chapter
programs.desc: Explore the life of Jim Morrison, the Doors frontman, and uncover the enigmatic details surrounding his untimely death in Paris at age 27.

programs.title: Willie Nelson: The Outlaw Country King
BKB: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programs.desc: LT Nelson defends the BKB Middleweight Title against Mark Tiffin, and Jared Grant meets Jon Barnard with the BKB Lightweight World Championship at stake.

programs.title: Elvis & Priscilla: Conditional Love
programs.desc: Experts peel back the layers of Priscilla and the Rock 'n' Roll King's controversial love story to cast light on the dysfunction under the dreamy and glamorous surface.
